final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator focused on new energy vehicles, digital gadgets, and lifestyle products.

Style/medium: needs a "modern tech lifestyle" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Bauhaus clean-geometry graphic design, 2010s flat-icon design movement, Japanese 家電 product catalog visual language; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center, visually balanced at small display sizes
Subject: must include visual elements representing three content pillars — new energy vehicles, digital/tech gadgets, and everyday lifestyle goods — unified into a single cohesive icon or emblem
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, neutral backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable, and energetic mood — exact treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a universally neutral and culturally safe palette — avoid colors with strong single-culture associations; exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and visually harmonious across both Chinese and international social platforms; must avoid symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry taboo associations in any major cultural group
Avoid: human faces or figures, religious symbols, political symbols, flags, hand gestures, culturally specific iconography that may carry unintended meaning
